name: Exploring Intersolv's Virtual Data Warehouse
description: Aberdeen Group profile examining Intersolv's Virtual Data Warehouse approach, which provides unified access to distributed data sources without requiring physical data consolidation. Structured as a Frictionless Data Package for archival and research use. Contains 45 observations, 12 entities, and 15 technologies extracted from the original 1995 document.

about.name: Data Warehousing
about.description: Technologies and practices for consolidating enterprise data for analytics and decision support

about.name: Data Virtualization
about.description: Providing unified data access without physical consolidation of data

distribution.name: entities.csv
distribution.description: Organizations and entities mentioned in the study with current status

distribution.name: technologies.csv
distribution.description: Technologies and products mentioned in the study with lifecycle status

distribution.name: observations.csv
distribution.description: Individual claims, facts, and observations extracted from the study

distribution.name: codes.csv
distribution.description: Controlled vocabulary for codes used across all tables

isBasedOn.name: Exploring Intersolv's Virtual Data Warehouse
isBasedOn.about: Product profile of Intersolv's Virtual Data Warehouse solution

variableMeasured.name: observation_type
variableMeasured.description: Type of observation: claim, fact, user-feedback, market-observation, product-feature, pricing

variableMeasured.name: entity_status
variableMeasured.description: Current status of organizations mentioned in 1995 study: active, acquired, merged, renamed, discontinued

variableMeasured.name: tech_lifecycle_status
variableMeasured.description: Current lifecycle status of technologies mentioned in 1995 study: active, evolved, legacy, discontinued

variableMeasured.name: sentiment
variableMeasured.description: Sentiment of analyst claims and observations: positive, neutral, negative
